economic_notes: Kebaowek Land Management Inc sold all assets and liabilities to MikanTransport L.P. and Mitikon L.P. as of December 31, 2020. GBEs include Kebaowek Land Management Inc, Amik Nikewin Development Inc, and Kitika Nijwaswi L.P. (which owns MikanTransport L.P. and Mitikon L.P.). Migizy Odenaw Inc. is fully consolidated.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to observe physical inventory count at Mitikon L.P. as of March 31, 2021 and April 1, 2020. Migizy Odenaw Inc. is fully consolidated (fiscal year end September 30, 2020 used). Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Kebaowek Land Management Inc, Amik Nikewin Development Inc, and Kitika Nijwaswi L.P. Kebaowek Land Management Inc sold all assets/liabilities to MikanTransport L.P. and Mitikon L.P. as of December 31, 2020 - major corporate restructuring. isc_funding calculated as sum of ISC Flexible ($821,538) + Fixed ($3,352,479) + Set ($25,000) + Block ($4,681,293) = $8,880,310. Total government transfers not separately calculated from segment data. Councillors honoraries noted at $27,000. No schedule of remuneration for individuals provided. annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt reimbursement only ($161,763); RRAP reimbursement of $48,535 excluded from this field.
